{{Infobox artifact
| name = Madra Engine
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|A Madra Engine is a highly valuable [[Divine Treasure]] constructed from brass, [[steel]], and [[dead matter]] of [[pure madra]]. This mechanical device features a blue crystal arrangement of tubes and utilizes moving pistons that hiss while venting [[madra]] [[essence]]. It functions as a tool for recovery, capable of restoring an individual's [[madra]] to allow for prolonged combat. Additionally, the engine can be powered by specific items, such as certain fruits, which could potentially grant an [[Underlord]] the lifespan of an [[Archlord]] or allow the device to operate without causing harm to the user.}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The Madra Engine is a [[Divine Treasure]] composed of [[dead matter]] consisting of [[pure madra]]. This blue crystal nest of tubes functions as a [[construct]] that settles into the center of madra channels to surround and contain the core. After [[Charity]] sunk the device into [[Yerin]]'s midsection, it began converting [[life]] and blood essence into [[madra]] at an accelerated rate. The engine successfully recovered [[Yerin]]'s [[madra]] and continues to restore it whenever she breathes.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">7</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Madra Engine]] is a [[Divine Treasure]] made of [[dead matter]] of [[pure madra]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19">''Wintersteel'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Madra Engine]] converts [[life]] and blood essence to [[madra]] faster.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Madra Engine]] is a blue crystal nest of tubes.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20">''Wintersteel'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Madra Engine]] was sunk into [[Yerin]]'s midsection by [[Charity]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Madra Engine]] is a [[construct]] that settles into the center of madra channels, surrounding and containing the core.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Madra Engine]] restores [[Yerin]]'s [[madra]] when she breathes.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c22">''Wintersteel'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Madra Engine]] recovered [[Yerin]]’s [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“It’s a Madra Engine,” Charity said, before Yerin could ask. “A Divine Treasure of great value, using as it does dead matter of pure madra.”<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“On top of which, it converts life and blood essence to madra faster, increasing the speed at which your spirit refills your core.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
